repo_prior_art.cite: doc/API.md §3: ThmSmith/PartialID empty seed; pid_late_bounded_defiers is one-period CLATE, not dynamic full-history IV

published_prior_art.cite: BalkePearl1997: static sharp binary-IV LP bounds; GabrielSjolanderSachs2023: static/imperfect randomized-experiment bounds

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_late_bounded_defiers: one-period Balke-Pearl-facing partial-ID envelope; exact-compliance corner is standard exact-ID logic

published_prior_art.cite: BalkePearl1997 gives the static binary-IV endpoint; exact-compliance IPW follows from standard sequential randomization
ChenZhang2023 and Han2024 are dynamic IV-optimality/welfare-ordering comparators, not full-history sharp sustained-effect IV bounds
BalkePearl1997 is static; ChenZhang2023 uses Bellman language but does not state joint latent-table pasting failure
SwansonLabrecqueHernan2018 is adjacent on sustained-treatment IV nulls, but not a T<=2 sharp-bound minimality theorem

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The static Balke-Pearl and exact-compliance IPW reductions are sanity checks, not novel published-axis content.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The survey should add Swanson, Labrecque, and Hernan 2018 on sustained treatment strategies with IVs as a closer sustained-regime comparator.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The proposal alternates between reproducing the full law P_{Y,D^T,Z^T,H_0} and using only bounded-outcome mean constraints; it should either assume binary/finite-support Y or define the LP constraints as observed cell probabilities plus conditional means.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: Theta_MK(P,e,s) is underdefined: 'retains induced stagewise compliance and outcome margins' does not specify the exact Markov-compressed feasible polytope being compared.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 3
soundness_flags.one_line: The T<=2 minimality statement refers to theta_{111,000}, which is not defined for horizons below 3; it should use theta_{1^T,0^T} or state the embedded-padding convention.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Define Theta_MK as an explicit LP with named retained and dropped constraints, so strict containment has a fixed mathematical target.
Add Swanson, Labrecque, and Hernan 2018 to Related work and explain why sustained-treatment IV null testing does not subsume sharp bounds for theta_{111,000}.
Specialize the flagship LP first to binary Y, then add a separate bounded-mean extension once the finite extreme-point argument is stated cleanly.

recommended_next_step: Revise the proposal to pin the outcome-observation convention, formalize the Markov-compressed comparison LP, and add the missed sustained-IV prior-art comparison.
